summary: Iter10 full validation: Administration > Groupes generator panel works (16 subgroups created in 1st click, 0 created in 2nd click confirming dedup), and Planning Global lane layout (computeLaneLayout) returns correct left%/width% for all 6 reference cases. Backend non-regression: 12/12 pytest cases pass (iter6 recap-ue + iter8 groups+promotion).
critical_code_review_comments: Administration.generateSubGroups() performs 16 sequential awaited POSTs — works but slow (~3s). Could use Promise.all for parallelism. Non-blocking.

PlanningGlobal.groupToLanes() uses regex /groupe\s*0*(\d)\s*([ab])/ which matches a 1-9 single digit, but the table can hold 'Groupe 10' which would be parsed as Groupe 1, then '0' ignored — fine because LANES system only supports 1..8 by design, but worth a defensive guard if more groups are added in the future.
computeLaneLayout: for non-contiguous groupings with equal left/right counts (e.g., 2 left + 2 right), code chooses LEFT (leftCount >= rightCount). Acceptable default but should be documented.
test_credentials: admin@ifsi.fr / Admin123! (verified working — login redirects to '/' not '/dashboard')
seed_data_creation: Created 16 generic subgroups (Groupe 1a..8b) and 6 TEST_iter10 sessions on next Monday 2026-05-25 for layout testing. All cleaned up at end of run (sessions DELETEd + 16 subgroups DELETEd).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iter10 layout system verified end-to-end via inline style inspection on .absolute parent of [data-testid=session-block-<id>]. Test cases verified: only_1a -> left=0%,width=6.25% ; contig 1a+1b+2a -> 0%/18.75% ; contig 5a+5b -> 50%/12.5% ; non-contig majority-left (1a+1b+2a+5a+5b) -> 0%/31.25% ; non-contig majority-right (1a+5a+5b+8a+8b) -> 68.75%/31.25% ; empty group_ids -> 0%/100%. All match spec exactly. Note login route is '/' (Dashboard), not '/dashboard' — use wait_for_timeout instead of wait_for_url('**/dashboard**').
rca of the issue: N/A — no bug found in iter10 scope.
